title: knautia arvensis var. kitaibelii
intro: Knautia arvensis var. kitaibelii, also known as Field Scabiosa, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Dipsacaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Knautia arvensis var. kitaibelii can be used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
